title: Dracula
author: Bram Stoker
rights_basis: Bram Stoker died in 1912 and Dracula was first published in 1897; Tier A requires verified public-domain source text and Project Gutenberg license evidence.
rollback_plan: Disable the Dracula draft flag, remove draft artifacts, and keep public_publish_actions=0.
qa_issues: Source text is required before Dracula can be approved.
Project Gutenberg source license was not deterministically verified from source text.
source_hash, content_hash, and provenance_hash are required.
source_load_issues: Source text was not fetched because EARNALISM_ALLOW_SOURCE_FETCH is not true; pass --source-text-file for offline verification.

issues: Tier C rights block all publishing.
verification_status must be approved before publishing.

blocked_reason: Source text is required before Dracula can be approved.; BLOCKED_SOURCE_TEXT_REQUIRED; Project Gutenberg source license was not deterministically verified from source text.; source_hash, content_hash, and provenance_hash are required.

ingestion_log: source_license is required before source ingestion.
blocked_reason must be cleared before source ingestion.
rights_tier must be A or B for source ingestion.
